{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Senior DevSecOps",
  "description": "TalenMO is a professional recruitment and talent solutions firm dedicated to sourcing, screening, and placing the right people in the right roles across various MSME industries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior DevSecOps
Job Location:&nbsp;Remote
Job Type: Freelance
Duration: Long-Term (6-12+Months)

Job Summary


	We are currently recruiting a highly skilled Senior DevSecOps &ndash; Integrate security practices into DevOps processes and cloud environments for exciting international AI projects.


Job Responsibilities


	Design, implement, and manage secure DevOps pipelines and cloud infrastructure environments.
	Integrate security best practices into CI/CD pipelines, application development, and deployment processes.
	Conduct security assessments, vulnerability scans, and risk analysis across systems and applications.
	Automate security controls, monitoring, and compliance checks within development and operational workflows.
	Collaborate with development, infrastructure, and AI engineering teams to ensure secure system architecture and deployments.
	Manage identity and access controls, secrets management, and cloud security configurations.
	Monitor infrastructure and applications for security threats, incidents, and unauthorized access.
	Implement container, Kubernetes, and cloud-native security solutions.
	Ensure compliance with industry security standards, policies, and regulatory requirements.
	Troubleshoot and resolve security, deployment, and infrastructure-related issues efficiently.
	Maintain documentation for security processes, incident response, and infrastructure configurations.
	Stay updated on emerging cybersecurity threats, DevSecOps tools, and industry best practices.


Requirement


	Experience: Minimum of 6 years.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send&nbsp;their CV to:&nbsp;temiloluwa.talenmo@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Senior DevSecOps Job at TalenMO




        
    

        
        TalenMO is a professional recruitment and talent solutions firm dedicated to sourcing, screening, and placing the right people in the right roles across various MSME industries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior DevSecOps
Job Location: Remote
Job Type: Freelance
Duration: Long-Term (6-12+Months)

Job Summary


	We are currently recruiting a highly skilled Senior DevSecOps – Integrate security practices into DevOps processes and cloud environments for exciting international AI projects.


Job Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Design, implement, and manage secure DevOps pipelines and cloud infrastructure environments.
	Integrate security best practices into CI/CD pipelines, application development, and deployment processes.
	Conduct security assessments, vulnerability scans, and risk analysis across systems and applications.
	Automate security controls, monitoring, and compliance checks within development and operational workflows.
	Collaborate with development, infrastructure, and AI engineering teams to ensure secure system architecture and deployments.
	Manage identity and access controls, secrets management, and cloud security configurations.
	Monitor infrastructure and applications for security threats, incidents, and unauthorized access.
	Implement container, Kubernetes, and cloud-native security solutions.
	Ensure compliance with industry security standards, policies, and regulatory requirements.
	Troubleshoot and resolve security, deployment, and infrastructure-related issues efficiently.
	Maintain documentation for security processes, incident response, and infrastructure configurations.
	Stay updated on emerging cybersecurity threats, DevSecOps tools, and industry best practices.


Requirement


	Experience: Minimum of 6 years.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Head of Marketing & Sales / Business Development",
  "description": "UnoCasa is a full service Human Resources Consultancy business with focus on Talent Acquisition, Learning &amp; Development and Consultancy services. Our raison d&rsquo;etre is the notion that your people are your advantage and proffer people-centric solutions to ensure your team accomplish your business goals.

We are not your run of the mill HR Company, we believe in team diversity and teamwork; we believe that the workplace should have an ambience that inspires productivity of the team; and the application of technologies to enhance efficiency. We know that every business is unique and tailor HR solutions to your organisation&rsquo;s needs. Our clients are in various sectors not limited to engineering, education, health oil &amp; gas, government, media, finance, retail, lifestyle, consultancy firms and services

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head of Marketing &amp; Sales / Business Development&nbsp;
Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a dynamic and growth-focused professional to lead our sales and marketing efforts, drive revenue growth, and manage strategic business development initiatives.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute sales and marketing strategies
	Manage the full sales cycle from lead generation to deal closure
	Lead and coordinate sales and marketing teams
	Build and maintain strategic partnerships and client relationships
	Monitor sales pipeline, conversion rates, and marketing ROI
	Oversee CRM systems and sales performance tracking
	Drive customer acquisition and revenue growth


Requirements


	Degree in Marketing, Business, or related field
	4&ndash;7 years of experience in sales/business development
	Strong negotiation and communication skills
	Hands-on experience with CRM systems
	Experience in real estate, construction, or project-based industries is an advantage
	Proven experience managing sales teams or channel partners


Ideal Candidate:


	Target-driven and strategic thinker
	Excellent relationship management skills
	Strong leadership and business development capabilities.


Salary
N400,000 - N500,000 per month.&nbsp;",

Head of Marketing & Sales / Business Development Job at UnoCasa Limited




        
    

        
        UnoCasa is a full service Human Resources Consultancy business with focus on Talent Acquisition, Learning & Development and Consultancy services. Our raison d’etre is the notion that your people are your advantage and proffer people-centric solutions to ensure your team accomplish your business goals.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are not your run of the mill HR Company, we believe in team diversity and teamwork; we believe that the workplace should have an ambience that inspires productivity of the team; and the application of technologies to enhance efficiency. We know that every business is unique and tailor HR solutions to your organisation’s needs. Our clients are in various sectors not limited to engineering, education, health oil & gas, government, media, finance, retail, lifestyle, consultancy firms and services

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head of Marketing & Sales / Business Development 
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a dynamic and growth-focused professional to lead our sales and marketing efforts, drive revenue growth, and manage strategic business development initiatives.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute sales and marketing strategies
	Manage the full sales cycle from lead generation to deal closure
	Lead and coordinate sales and marketing teams
	Build and maintain strategic partnerships and client relationships
	Monitor sales pipeline, conversion rates, and marketing ROI
	Oversee CRM systems and sales performance tracking
	Drive customer acquisition and revenue growth


Requirements


	Degree in Marketing, Business, or related field
	4–7 years of experience in sales/business development
	Strong negotiation and communication skills
	Hands-on experience with CRM systems
	Experience in real estate, construction, or project-based industries is an advantage
	Proven experience managing sales teams or channel partners


Ideal Candidate:


	Target-driven and strategic thinker
	Excellent relationship management skills
	Strong leadership and business development capabilities.


Salary
N400,000 - N500,000 per month.     

    

        Click here to Apply

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Employment Type: Full-time
Work Schedule: 24/7 operation (Rotational shifts, including weekends and public holidays)

Job Summary


	We are seeking smart, customer-focused Customer Support / Sales Onboarding Agents to engage customers at the point of sale and onboard them onto products they have purchased.
	The role requires clear communication, product knowledge, and the ability to guide customers smoothly through onboarding while delivering an excellent customer experience.
	This position operates in a fast-paced, call center environment and is ideal for individuals who are confident, persuasive, and service-oriented.


Key Responsibilities


	Engage customers via calls or other approved channels.
	Educate customers on the product they have purchased and guide them through the onboarding process.
	Clearly explain product features, benefits, and usage to customers.
	Resolve basic customer inquiries and escalate complex issues appropriately.

	Meet daily and weekly onboarding, quality, and productivity targets.

	Previous experience in customer service, call center, sales is an added advantage
	Good verbal communication, interpersonal skills, Quick to learn new products and processes and customer-focused.

	Basic computer literacy and ability to use CRM or call systems

Customer Support / Sales Onboarding Agent (Hausa-speaking) Job at Mwanga Limited




        
    

        
        Mwanga is a pioneer tech-driven debt recovery and business support outsourcing company with a vision to be the leading extension to global teams in Africa. We started our pilot operations in 2018 with a small agile team and have scaled impressively since then in results and team becoming trusted by key players for recoveries in Nigeria. We offer business support to businesses with the aim of helping them scale using ethical and innovative technology strategies. We are trusted by Africa’s leading lenders to recover their outstanding debts and to scale our impact. We provide a range of services ranging from debt recovery, telemarketing, call center outsourcing, virtual assistant services, customer support services, and data analysis.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Support / Sales Onboarding Agent (Hausa-speaking)
Job Location: Maryland, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Schedule: 24/7 operation (Rotational shifts, including weekends and public holidays)

Job Summary


	We are seeking smart, customer-focused Customer Support / Sales Onboarding Agents to engage customers at the point of sale and onboard them onto products they have purchased.
	The role requires clear communication, product knowledge, and the ability to guide customers smoothly through onboarding while delivering an excellent customer experience.
	This position operates in a fast-paced, call center environment and is ideal for individuals who are confident, persuasive, and service-oriented.


Key Responsibilities


	Engage customers via calls or other approved channels.
	Educate customers on the product they have purchased and guide them through the onboarding process.
	Clearly explain product features, benefits, and usage to customers.
	Resolve basic customer inquiries and escalate complex issues appropriately.
	Ensure accurate capture and documentation of customer information.
	Meet daily and weekly onboarding, quality, and productivity targets.
	Adhere strictly to call scripts, onboarding procedures, and compliance guidelines.
	Deliver a professional and positive customer experience at all times.
	Work collaboratively with Team Leads and QA to improve performance and service quality.


Requirements / Qualifications / Skills


	Minimum of OND / HND / B.Sc. qualification
	Previous experience in customer service, call center, sales is an added advantage
	Good verbal communication, interpersonal skills, Quick to learn new products and processes and customer-focused.
	Strong typing skills with high speed and accuracy for efficient data entry and customer interaction.
	Fluency in English and any other local language i.e Hausa, Igbo or Yoruba is an added advantage.
	Basic computer literacy and ability to use CRM or call systems
	Can work 24-hour rotational shifts, including weekends and public holidays.
	Must reside in Maryland, Lagos or nearby environs.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Fiber Engineer",
  "description": "Ngcom Network Solutions&nbsp;is an Internet Service Provider (ISP) that delivers fast, reliable, and affordable broadband internet services to homes and businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Fiber Engineer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ajah, Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Design, install, and maintain fiber optic networks, including backbone, metro, and last-mile connections.
	Perform fiber splicing, termination, and patching in accordance with industry standards.
	Conduct fiber testing using OTDR, power meters, and light sources to ensure signal integrity and performance.
	Troubleshoot and resolve fiber faults, outages, and performance degradation promptly.
	Support network rollout projects, upgrades, and expansions.
	Interpret network diagrams, fiber route maps, and as-built documentation.
	Ensure proper labeling, documentation, and record-keeping of fiber routes and connections.
	Collaborate with IP engineers, field technicians, and operations teams to ensure end-to-end network functionality.
	Monitor network performance and proactively identify potential issues.
	Ensure compliance with safety standards and company engineering procedures.
	Provide technical support during customer installations and service escalations.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;gandonuoladapoh@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the mail.",

Fiber Engineer Job at Ngcom Network Solutions




        
    

        
        Ngcom Network Solutions is an Internet Service Provider (ISP) that delivers fast, reliable, and affordable broadband internet services to homes and businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Fiber Engineer

Job Location: Ajah, Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Design, install, and maintain fiber optic networks, including backbone, metro, and last-mile connections.
	Perform fiber splicing, termination, and patching in accordance with industry standards.
	Conduct fiber testing using OTDR, power meters, and light sources to ensure signal integrity and performance.
	Troubleshoot and resolve fiber faults, outages, and performance degradation promptly.
	Support network rollout projects, upgrades, and expansions.
	Interpret network diagrams, fiber route maps, and as-built documentation.
	Ensure proper labeling, documentation, and record-keeping of fiber routes and connections.
	Collaborate with IP engineers, field technicians, and operations teams to ensure end-to-end network functionality.
	Monitor network performance and proactively identify potential issues.
	Ensure compliance with safety standards and company engineering procedures.
	Provide technical support during customer installations and service escalations.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Accountant",
  "description": "Fadac Resources and Services Limited -&nbsp;From recruitment to workforce strategy, we help you build teams that grow with your vision. Let&rsquo;s power your next phase of growth&mdash;through people.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location:&nbsp;Asese-Ibafo, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a detail-oriented Accountant to join our finance team at Mondo.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing day-to-day financial records, ensuring accurate bookkeeping, supporting financial reporting, and maintaining compliance with internal financial controls and regulatory standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Prepare and maintain accurate financial records, ledgers, and reports.
	Handle daily bookkeeping activities including postings, reconciliations, and journal entries.
	Manage accounts payable and receivable processes.
	Reconcile bank statements and resolve discrepancies in a timely manner.
	Assist in the preparation of monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports.
	Support budget preparation and monitoring of expenditures.
	Ensure compliance with financial policies, procedures, and regulatory requirements.
	Assist with audits by providing necessary documentation and financial data.
	Work closely with other departments to ensure accurate financial tracking.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or HND in Accounting, Finance, or related field.
	2&ndash;3 years of relevant experience in accounting or finance roles.
	Strong knowledge of basic accounting principles and financial reporting.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software.
	Strong attention to detail and numerical accuracy.


Salary
N300,000 Net monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;clinton.o@fadacresources.com&nbsp;using &quot;ACCOUNTANT&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

Accountant Job at Fadac Resources and Services Limited




        
    

        
        Fadac Resources and Services Limited - From recruitment to workforce strategy, we help you build teams that grow with your vision. Let’s power your next phase of growth—through people.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Asese-Ibafo, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a detail-oriented Accountant to join our finance team at Mondo.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing day-to-day financial records, ensuring accurate bookkeeping, supporting financial reporting, and maintaining compliance with internal financial controls and regulatory standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Prepare and maintain accurate financial records, ledgers, and reports.
	Handle daily bookkeeping activities including postings, reconciliations, and journal entries.
	Manage accounts payable and receivable processes.
	Reconcile bank statements and resolve discrepancies in a timely manner.
	Assist in the preparation of monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports.
	Support budget preparation and monitoring of expenditures.
	Ensure compliance with financial policies, procedures, and regulatory requirements.
	Assist with audits by providing necessary documentation and financial data.
	Work closely with other departments to ensure accurate financial tracking.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree or HND in Accounting, Finance, or related field.
	2–3 years of relevant experience in accounting or finance roles.
	Strong knowledge of basic accounting principles and financial reporting.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software.
	Strong attention to detail and numerical accuracy.


Salary
N300,000 Net monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "ACCOUNTANT" as the subject of the mail.
